title: ononis antiquorum subsp. pungens
intro: Ononis antiquorum subsp. pungens, also known as the 'Spare Spike Restharrow', is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its distinctive spiky stems and purple flowers. Traditionally, Ononis antiquorum subsp. pungens has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and act as a natural antiseptic. Ononis antiquorum subsp. pungens can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
